backend/main.mo: Motoko actor defining a game session manager on ICP with CRUD operations for game sessions, territory ownership, and unit positions using mutable Maps.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping two UI features (GameTimer text color fix and End Turn button) to their affected files and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Auto-generated JSON summaries of all frontend source files describing each component, hook, and utility's purpose and key implementation details.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind base CSS file defining CSS custom property design tokens for light and dark themes (colors, radius, chart, sidebar variables).
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML entry point titled 'Terras Ancestrais' that mounts the React app via /src/main.tsx.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component managing top-level navigation between landing, tutorial, lobby, and game views with player state passed to GamePage.
frontend/src/components/CaptureProgressB: Small React component rendering a colored progress bar for territory capture state, hidden when fully native or fully colonized.
frontend/src/components/GameBoard.tsx: Canvas-based game board component that renders territories with terrain colors/icons, ownership tints, unit sprites, selection rings, and movement overlays.
frontend/src/components/GameLobby.tsx: Lobby screen component displaying two team columns of eight configurable PlayerSlotCards with balance validation and a Start Game button.
frontend/src/components/GameOverScreen.t: Displays the game-over screen with a winner announcement, animated canvas confetti/particle effect, and buttons to play again or return to the lobby. Plays a fanfare sound effect on mount.
frontend/src/components/GameTimer.tsx: Renders a match countdown timer and an optional conquest countdown timer with color-coded warning/critical states.
frontend/src/components/HelpOverlay.tsx: Shows a modal overlay with a categorized guide covering controls, movement, combat, territories, victory conditions, and terrain bonuses. Closes on Escape or backdrop click.
frontend/src/components/LandingScreen.ts: Renders the game's landing/title screen with decorative corner ornaments, team emblems, and buttons to start playing or view the tutorial.
frontend/src/components/PlayerSlotCard.t: Card component for configuring a single player slot, allowing toggling bot/human, entering a player name, selecting a team, and choosing a class with its emblem.
frontend/src/components/TalentSelectionM: Modal that appears on level-up, letting the player choose between two talent specialization paths (PathA/PathB) with stat bonuses displayed for the leveled unit.
Renders a sidebar legend showing territory ownership counts, a conquest progress bar, strategic point statuses, and an animated countdown timer when colonizers hold all strategic points.
frontend/src/components/TutorialScreen.t: Multi-step tutorial screen component that walks players through game mechanics (map, movement, combat, conquest, victory conditions, RPG progression) with step-by-step detail lists and skip/complete callbacks.
Displays the action panel for a selected game unit, showing unit stats, terrain info, available enemies in range, and buttons for move, attack, fortify, abilities, build, and destroy actions.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor (authenticated or anonymous) using React Query, and invalidates dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useGameEngine.ts: Core game engine hook managing full game state including unit selection, movement, combat, XP/leveling, territory conquest, bot AI turns, and a countdown timer with win condition checks.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an Internet Identity authentication context and provider using DFINITY's AuthClient, exposing login/logout functions, identity state, and login status to child components.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for fetching and mutating game session data on the ICP backend, including get session, create session, update territory ownership, and update unit position.
frontend/src/hooks/useSoundEffects.ts: A React hook that manages all game sound effects using the Web Audio API, including unit actions, combat, ambient loops (forest, tribal drums, conquest drone), and mute control via a shared AudioContext.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports period-appropriate fonts, configures a 16th-century parchment-themed CSS custom property palette (light and dark modes), and defines reusable component utility classes via Tailwind layers.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with React Query and an Internet Identity authentication provider wrapping the root App component.
frontend/src/pages/GamePage.tsx: The main game page component that wires together the game engine, sound effects, UI panels (board, timer, unit actions, legend, help, talent selection), and handles user interactions like move mode toggling, sound toggling, and turn management.
frontend/src/types/game.ts: TypeScript type definitions for the entire game domain, including enums for teams, terrain, and unit classes, and interfaces for units, territories, constructions, game state, and player slots.
frontend/src/utils/botAI.ts: Bot AI logic that determines actions for CPU-controlled units based on their class type, selecting moves, attacks, ability uses, and build/destroy actions with class-specific strategies.
frontend/src/utils/gameInitializer.ts: Defines base stats, abilities, and talent paths for all unit classes, and provides utility functions for initializing game state including map layout, territory generation, and unit placement.
frontend/src/utils/winConditions.ts: Provides utility functions to check win conditions for the Colonizers (conquest countdown reaches 0) and Native Peoples (time runs out), and calculates the current conquest progress state.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration with dark mode, custom fonts (Cinzel, IM Fell English), an extended color palette using OKLCH values for game-specific colors (parchment, terracotta, native-green, etc.), and plugins for typography, container queries, and animations.
project_state.json: Project state manifest (version 13) describing the game's overall architecture, existing features, known issues, and design notes for a 16th-century 2D top-down strategy/action RPG with two factions and conquest-based win conditions.
